steps.title: Spot the sequence relationship
steps.content: Konkoly's procedure has two steps: first teaching the eye movements, then attaching electrodes. The transition must mark the progression to the next phase.

steps.title: Match the transition to the forward movement
steps.content: “Next,” marks explicit progression from one step to the following one. The other three don't indicate forward sequence: “Specifically” narrows an existing point, “For instance” provides an example, and “In sum” summarizes. That matches Choice B — Next,.
